title: Nursery Rhyme. XXII. Historical
content:
[The following is a fragment of a song on the subject, which was introduced by Russell in the character of Jerry Sneak.]

        Poor old Robinson Crusoe!
        Poor old Robinson Crusoe!
        They made him a coat
        Of an old nanny goat,
            I wonder how they could do so!
        With a ring a ting tang,
        And a ring a ting tang,
            Poor old Robinson Crusoe!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. XXII. Historical" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
